title: Month-End Close: Draft Adjusting Journal Entries
description: Have Claude draft your standard month-end adjusting entries with supporting calculations, ready for your review.

steps.title: Create a 'Draft AJEs' skill
steps.content: Write a skill that takes the reconciliation outputs from the previous step and identifies entries needed: accruals, prepaids, depreciation, reclasses. Provide Claude with your chart of accounts and any recurring entry templates.

steps.title: Require supporting calculations for every entry
steps.content: Tell Claude that every journal entry must include: the debit and credit accounts, the dollar amount, a one-line description, and the calculation or source that supports it. No unexplained entries.

steps.title: Add a human approval gate
steps.content: The skill should never post entries directly. It produces a formatted journal entry document for your review. You approve, reject, or modify before anything hits the books.
